title: diplazium × takamiyae
intro: Diplazium × takamiyae is a natural hybrid species of fern, resulting from the cross between Diplazium esculentum and Diplazium tsushimense. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Diplazium × takamiyae include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antifungal and antibacterial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Diplazium × takamiyae is often prepared as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in infusions and salves to promote wound healing and skin health.
